file_insights.purpose: Root package initialization for shared utilities
key_elements: Submodule exports (middleware, permissions, serializers, views, utils)
file_insights.patterns: Package-level documentation and re-exports for convenient imports

file_insights.purpose: Middleware subpackage definition and ordering documentation
key_elements: Documentation of three planned middleware classes
file_insights.patterns: Architectural documentation with middleware load order constraints

file_insights.purpose: Permission system definition and RBAC/ABAC pattern documentation
file_insights.patterns: RBAC/ABAC authorization pattern documentation with scope hierarchy

file_insights.purpose: DRF serializer base classes and API response format specification
key_elements: Organization auto-injection and soft delete handling
file_insights.patterns: Standardized API response envelope with success/error branches

file_insights.purpose: Utility functions and helpers for common operations
key_elements: Client IP extraction and pagination utilities
file_insights.patterns: Utility function organization with cross-cutting concern grouping

file_insights.purpose: DRF base view classes with multi-tenancy and soft delete patterns
key_elements: Code examples for correct vs incorrect implementations

patterns_discovered.description: Each __init__.py file serves as architectural specification and integration guide, not just module exports
patterns_discovered.significance: Establishes shared understanding of cross-cutting concerns before implementation

patterns_discovered.description: Tenant-aware filtering (organization scoping) is fundamental to views, serializers, and middleware
patterns_discovered.significance: Security model embedded in base classes prevents data leakage between tenants

patterns_discovered.description: Hard deletes forbidden; all deletions use deleted_at timestamp field
patterns_discovered.significance: Data retention and audit trail preservation built into base patterns

patterns_discovered.description: Permissions follow {resource}.{action} pattern with PLATFORM/ORGANIZATION scope levels
patterns_discovered.significance: Predictable permission naming enables scalable RBAC/ABAC implementation

patterns_discovered.description: All responses use {success: bool, data/error: {...}} structure with pagination metadata
patterns_discovered.significance: Consistent client-side error handling and response parsing across all endpoints

patterns_discovered.description: Critical ordering constraints documented (TenantMiddleware after AuthenticationMiddleware)
patterns_discovered.significance: Prevents security vulnerabilities and ordering-dependent bugs

gotchas_discovered.description: TenantMiddleware MUST be placed after AuthenticationMiddleware to access user context
gotchas_discovered.impact: Middleware ordering violation would cause tenant isolation to fail silently
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Documented in middleware/__init__.py with numbered priority list

gotchas_discovered.description: Every queryset MUST include organization filtering or data is exposed across tenants
gotchas_discovered.impact: High - security vulnerability if overlooked; one missing filter exposes all tenant data
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Documented with explicit CORRECT/INCORRECT examples in views/__init__.py

gotchas_discovered.description: Hard deletes are forbidden; all deletions must use deleted_at timestamp
gotchas_discovered.impact: Data loss and loss of audit trail if hard delete called on base model
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Documented with CORRECT/INCORRECT examples; base view class implements SoftDeleteMixin

gotchas_discovered.description: Object-level permissions require AUTHENTICATION_BACKENDS configuration and ObjectPermissionBackend setup
gotchas_discovered.impact: Object permissions silently disabled if backend not configured
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Documented in permissions/__init__.py with integration notes

approach_outcome.objective: Create shared directory structure for middleware and utilities
approach_outcome.what_was_done: Established 6 package-level __init__.py files with comprehensive architectural documentation
key_achievements: Documented multi-tenancy security patterns with examples
approach_outcome.implementation_state: Skeleton structure complete; actual classes/functions to be implemented in submodules

recommendations.rationale: Object-level permissions depend on proper backend configuration; should be documented in settings setup

recommendations.recommendation: Implement TenantViewSet base class as first priority
recommendations.rationale: Security-critical; all other views depend on it for organization filtering; prevents accidental data leakage

recommendations.recommendation: Create middleware.tenant module with TenantMiddleware implementation
recommendations.rationale: Architectural dependency; must be available before settings configuration
utils/__init__.py mentions 'centralized error code definitions' but none are defined; should create error_codes.py

recommendations.recommendation: Create permission classes with detailed docstrings
recommendations.rationale: Permission system is complex; each class needs clear documentation of scope, usage, and examples
Supports deleted_at and other audit fields; should enforce timestamp field handling across models

recommendations.recommendation: Add type hints to planned utility functions
recommendations.rationale: Improves IDE support and documentation clarity for shared utility functions
